ai.title: AI in my daily work
ai.subtitle: How I configure and use AI tools in product: criteria, integrations and templates.
ai.philosophy: AI is a copilot, not the pilot. I use it to accelerate exploration, generate boilerplate and review code — always with human judgement, tests and reviews before merging.
ai.copilotDesc: Sensible policy for teams: privacy, allowed models, permitted repos and context limits.
ai.cursorDesc: Project rules, slash commands and agents versioned in the repo. The CLI stays out of the way so focus is preserved.
ai.openrouterDesc: One API key to route across multiple models (Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, Gemini) with fallback and observability.
ai.mcpDesc: Standardized connectors between the model and real data: Jira, Linear, GitHub, databases. Less copy-paste, more context.
ai.skillsDesc: Reusable procedures stored in the repo: how to open a PR, how to write migrations, how to review accessibility. The agent applies them only when relevant.
